title: sweech tmux on|off|status CLI subcommand
description: Add `sweech tmux on|off|status` so users can toggle tmux-wrapping from the CLI (not just the dashboard settings drawer). Reads/writes the same `dashboard.tmux.enabled` setting from config.json. `status` prints current state + tmux availability + per-profile overrides. 5+ tests. Surfaced in setup wizard step too.

context.text: Filed via /vy-backlog final-pass 2026-05-18. Gap surfaced in 48h-conversation audit.
